mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.login_id, u.password, u.nickname, u.email, u.social_type, u.social_id, u.status, u.region_id, r.region_name, u.created_at, u.updated_at FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_region r ON u.region_id = r.region_id WHERE u.login_id = #{loginId} AND u.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET region_id = #{regionId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT profile_image, profile_image_type FROM tb_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
